pages.title: Frequently Asked Questions
pages.subtitle: Answers to common questions about the Arab Urban Development Institute, its programs, and services.

empty: No questions are available at the moment.

fallback.question: How can I join the Arab Urban Development Institute membership?
fallback.answer: You can apply by filling out the membership form on the "Join Us" page. Our team will review your application and contact you.

fallback.question: What membership categories are available?
fallback.answer: The institute offers memberships for cities, government entities, academic institutions, and individual experts.

fallback.question: Are the institute programs free?
fallback.answer: Programs vary between free and paid depending on the program type and target audience.

fallback.question: How can I contact the institute?
fallback.answer: You can reach us through the "Contact Us" page, email, or our social media channels.
